title: paspalum crispulum
intro: Paspalum crispulum, also known as Paspalum triviale, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Paspalum crispulum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support respiratory health. In herbal preparations, Paspalum crispulum is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
